concerns.detail: Added text contains a personal attack against a commenter defending the professor, accusing them of 'bootlicking' (舔) and having a 'too comfortable' PhD experience, rather than addressing the substantive arguments about the professor's advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: （哥们在manling三个黑点下面一直舔是什么鬼，是不是phd念的太舒服了，建议去红榜写，这里不适合你）
